speaker: speaker1
text: I need to stop eating such unhealthy foods .

speaker: speaker2
text: I know what you mean . I've started eating better myself .

speaker: speaker1
text: What foods do you eat now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I tend to stick to fruits , vegetables , and chicken .

speaker: speaker1
text: Those are the only things you eat ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Why aren't you eating anything else ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , fruits and vegetables are very healthy .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's really healthy to eat when you bake it .

speaker: speaker1
text: I guess that does sound a lot healthier .
